text: So, like, why does my username have a cat emoji?? I don’t even like cats! And there’s no way to change it, right? Totally confusing.
Hey, I thought the premium plan included unlimited storage, but now I'm seeing a limit. What's up with that?
I ordered some shoes and they sent me the wrong size. It's really disappointing because I was looking forward to wearing them. Can I get a refund?

So, I was trying to watch this movie and kept getting an error on your app. It’s really annoying because I just bought popcorn for a whole film night with my friends, and now we’re just sitting here. What’s up with that? Also, why does it take so long to load the menu? Like, do you guys even care about our movie experience?
I need a refund for the shirt I ordered. It's not the right size.

I can't believe I was charged for something I didn’t even use! I was certain the trial was free, but now there’s this unexpected charge on my account. It’s really upsetting and feels unfair, to be honest. Can someone please look into this? I thought I had canceled it before it went through. It's just very confusing!
I got charged twice for my last order, but I think I only placed one. Could you sort this out? Order #56789.
I was charged for a premium subscription but I only wanted the basic one. Can you reverse the charge?
So like, my app won't open. I thought it was fixed? But now it's just a blank page, ugh. Sometimes works, sometimes doesnt. Really confused.

So I was trying to figure out how come my subscription says it's active but I can't access any of the premium features? Like, I swear I paid for it, but now it feels like I'm being tricked? What even is going on?
I recently received a notification about changes to my account, but I’m feeling really lost about what this means for my subscription. Can you clarify these adjustments for me?
hey, my login isn't working? like, I think I changed my password but it’s not letting me in. maybe I forgot it or something? also, no idea what email I used orrr. kinda annoying tbh.

I can't believe how this is turning out. You claim to have my back for years but now I feel totally neglected. One minute my plan is upgraded, and the next, I'm not even sure if I’m on the same plan anymore. It’s like you don’t even care about loyal customers!
I have noticed that the email address linked to my account is incorrect, and I am unable to make the changes myself. Could you please guide me on how to rectify this?
I can't seem to connect to my Wi-Fi, I've tried everything! It's so frustrating. My laptop just keeps saying no network available. What is going on?
I ordered a laptop and received a tablet instead. It’s like they don’t even care about orders!
